use_cases: Display user testimonials in a Twitter-style card format on landing pages
Show social proof with verified badges on saas product pages
Build trust through authentic-looking social media testimonials in e-commerce
Showcase creator endorsements on portfolio or community sites
Display user feedback in a familiar social media card layout
ai_summary: A Twitter-style testimonial card component that displays user testimonials with avatar, username, verified badge, tweet content, engagement metrics (likes/retweets), and date. Uses Twitter's blue accent color for the verified badge. Supports hover and tap interactions, making it ideal for displaying social proof testimonials on landing pages, saas products, or e-commerce sites in a familiar social media card format.
